channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [RAJTV] Raj Television Network Approves Audited FY26 Results
item.description:
Raj Television Network Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board also appointed Mr. Sri Hari Saravana Vignesh as Content Head- Senior Management Personnel (SMP) of the Company effective May 12, 2026. The Statutory Auditors, M/s. N Naresh & Co., Chartered Accountants, issued an audit report with an unmodified opinion on the financial results.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the board.
  • Sri Hari Saravana Vignesh appointed as Content Head- SMP.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.
  • Meeting commenced at 12:00 P.M. and concluded at 3:45 P.M. on May 12, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RAJ TELEVISION NETWORK LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RELIGARE] Religare FY26 Revenue at ₹8,493.84 Cr, Up 14.7% YoY
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Religare Enterprises Ltd reported a consolidated revenue of ₹8,493.84 crore for FY26, a 14.7% YoY increase, driven by its health insurance business. Consolidated PAT stood at ₹73.16 crore. The health insurance business, Care Health Insurance, reported a gross written premium of ₹11,417 crore, up 24% YoY, with a 19.7% market share in the SAHI category. Religare Broking reported an operating income of ₹373.4 crore, boosted by a rise in Average Daily Turnover (ADTO). The company is progressing with the demerger of its financial services business and has strengthened its management team and governance frameworks. A capital raise of ₹1,500 crore via convertible warrants is underway.

  • FY26 consolidated revenue grew 14.7% YoY to ₹8,493.84 crore.
  • Consolidated PAT for FY26 is reported at ₹73.16 crore.
  • Care Health Insurance gross written premium up 24% YoY to ₹11,417 crore.
  • Religare Broking operating income at ₹373.4 crore due to ADTO increase.
  • ₹1,500 crore capital raise via convertible warrants is in progress.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELIGARE ENTERPRISES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PGINVIT] POWERGRID InvIT Board to Consider FY26 Results & Distribution
item.description:
A meeting of the Board of Directors of POWERGRID Unchahar Transmission Limited, the Investment Manager to POWERGRID Infrastructure Investment Trust (PGInvIT), is scheduled for May 15, 2026. The board will consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial information of PGInvIT for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, subject to the Statutory Auditors' report. They will also consider the declaration of distribution to unitholders of PGInvIT for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The record date for the proposed distribution, if declared, will be May 20, 2026. The trading window, which has been closed since March 31, 2026, will remain closed until May 17, 2026, and will reopen on May 18, 2026.

  • POWERGRID InvIT board meeting set for May 15, 2026.
  • FY26 audited financial results to be considered.
  • Distribution to unitholders for Q4 FY26 on the agenda.
  • Record date for distribution, if declared, is May 20, 2026.
  • Trading window to reopen on May 18, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: POWERGRID Infrastructure Investment Trust | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [TRESCON] Trescon Ltd: Standalone Revenue from Operations at ₹1,283.93 Lakhs
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Trescon Ltd's board approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Standalone revenue from operations stood at ₹1,283.93 lakhs for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, compared to ₹1,626.41 lakhs in the corresponding quarter of the previous year. The company reported a loss of ₹(196.36) lakhs from continuing operations for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.

  • Trescon Ltd approved audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Standalone revenue from operations for the quarter stood at ₹1,283.93 Lakhs.
  • The company reported a loss of ₹(196.36) lakhs from continuing operations.
  • Auditors, M/s Namita & Co., issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Trescon Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [THOMASCOOK] Thomas Cook India FY26 Total Income Up 3% to ₹85,578 Mn
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Thomas Cook (India) Ltd reported a 3% growth in total income for FY26, reaching ₹85,578 Mn despite geopolitical challenges. Consolidated PBT (before exceptional items) for FY26 stood at ₹3,328 Mn compared to ₹3,852 Mn for FY25. The company declared a 50% dividend on equity shares. CRISIL reaffirmed the Group’s credit ratings at CRISIL AA/Stable/CRISIL A1+. Cash and bank balances stood at ₹26,162 Mn as of March 31, 2026.

  • Thomas Cook India's FY26 total income grew by 3% to ₹85,578 Mn.
  • Consolidated PBT (before exceptional items) for FY26 was ₹3,328 Mn.
  • Standalone PBT (before exceptional items) grew by 2% to ₹1,690 Mn.
  • Company declared a dividend of 50% on its equity share.
  • CRISIL reaffirmed Thomas Cook India Group’s credit ratings at CRISIL AA/Stable/CRISIL A1+.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: THOMAS COOK (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PGINVIT] POWERGRID InvIT: Record Date for Distribution is May 20, 2026
item.description:
POWERGRID Infrastructure Investment Trust announced that the record date for the purpose of distribution for the 3rd financial year 2025-26 is May 20, 2026. A board meeting of POWERGRID Unchahar Transmission Limited, the Investment Manager, is scheduled for May 15, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial information for the year ended March 31, 2026, and to declare distribution to unitholders for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for units of PGInvIT will remain closed until May 17, 2026, and will open on May 18, 2026.

  • POWERGRID InvIT sets record date for distribution as May 20, 2026.
  • Board meeting scheduled on May 15, 2026, to approve FY26 financials.
  • Board to consider declaration of distribution to unitholders for Q4 FY26.
  • Trading window closed until May 17, 2026, reopening on May 18, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: POWERGRID Infrastructure Investment Trust | Category: Dividend

item.title: [BLISSGVS] Bliss GVS Pharma: FY26 Results, 100% Dividend Declared
item.description:
Bliss GVS Pharma Ltd's board meeting on May 12, 2026, approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The board recommended a final dividend of 100%, i.e., ₹1 per equity share, subject to shareholder approval. They also approved the re-appointment of BDO India Services Private Limited as the internal auditor for FY 2026-27. The 41st Annual General Meeting is scheduled for July 15, 2026, via video conferencing.

  • Audited FY26 standalone and consolidated financial results approved.
  • Final dividend of 100% (₹1 per share) recommended for FY26.
  • BDO India Services re-appointed as internal auditor for FY27.
  • 41st AGM scheduled for July 15, 2026, via video conferencing.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BLISS GVS PHARMA LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PLATIND] Platinum Industries: KMP Authorised for Materiality Determination
item.description:
Platinum Industries Ltd has authorized key managerial personnel (KMP) to determine the materiality of events and make disclosures to stock exchanges under Regulation 30(5) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The authorized KMPs include Krishna Dushyant Rana (Managing Director), Ashok Bothra (CFO), and Bhagyashree Mallawat (CS). Their contact details are provided for disclosure purposes, and this information is available on the company's website.

  • Platinum Industries authorizes KMPs for event materiality determination.
  • Authorisation is under SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
  • Krishna Dushyant Rana, Ashok Bothra, and Bhagyashree Mallawat are the authorized KMPs.
  • Contact details of KMPs are provided for disclosure purposes.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Platinum Industries Ltd | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [PACEDIGITK] Pace Digitek: Monitoring Agency Report for Q4 FY26
item.description:
Pace Digitek Ltd submitted a Monitoring Agency Report by Crisil Ratings Limited for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI regulations. The report pertains to the utilization of IPO proceeds and confirms no deviations from the stated objectives. Gross proceeds from the fresh issue were ₹8,191.48 million, with ₹733.14 million allocated to issue expenses, resulting in net proceeds of ₹7,458.34 million. The report, available on the company's website, declares an objective view based on provided information, without independent verification or legally binding obligations.

  • Crisil Ratings issued a Monitoring Agency Report for Pace Digitek for Q4 FY26.
  • The report confirms no deviations from IPO objectives based on information provided.
  • Gross IPO proceeds were ₹8,191.48 million, with net proceeds at ₹7,458.34 million after expenses.
  • The report is in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
  • Crisil Ratings states no conflict of interest in monitoring the utilization of issue proceeds.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Pace Digitek Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [SOBME] Sobhagya Mercantile JV Bags ₹260.53 Cr Irrigation Project
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sobhagya Mercantile Ltd, through its joint venture M/s Adyal L.I.S. JV (with 40% stake), has received a tender acceptance from Vidarbha Irrigation Development Corporation for the construction of the Adyal Lift Irrigation Scheme under the Gosikhurd Project. The project is valued at ₹260,53,36,041 and is to be executed within 33 months. The JV is required to submit an initial security deposit of ₹2,61,29,200.

  • Sobhagya Mercantile's JV secures ₹260.53 Cr irrigation project.
  • Project involves construction of Adyal Lift Irrigation Scheme.
  • Sobhagya Mercantile holds a 40% stake in the JV.
  • Project execution timeline is 33 months.
  • Initial security deposit of ₹2.61 Cr is required.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SOBHAGYA MERCHANTILE LTD. | Category: Business Update
